import React from 'react'; import './Page.css'; import './Events.css'; const EVENTS = [ { date: 'TBD', year: '2025', title: 'Founding Meeting', type: 'satsang', location: 'Rutgers University–New Brunswick', desc: 'Our first gathering — an open satsang-style discussion on identity, purpose, and what it means to build community as women at Rutgers.', }, { date: 'TBD', year: '2025', title: 'What is Shakti?', type: 'discussion', location: 'Rutgers University–New Brunswick', desc: 'A reflective dialogue on the concept of Shakti — divine feminine energy, inner strength, and what it looks like in our everyday lives.', }, { date: 'TBD', year: '2025', title: 'Meditation & Stillness', type: 'workshop', location: 'Rutgers University–New Brunswick', desc: 'A guided meditation session rooted in Hindu contemplative practice. All experience levels welcome — just bring yourself.', }, { date: 'TBD', year: '2025', title: 'Women & Leadership', type: 'speaker event', location: 'Rutgers University–New Brunswick', desc: 'A speaker event exploring leadership through the lens of Hindu values — compassion, resilience, and service.', }, { date: 'TBD', year: '2025', title: 'Community & Service Initiative', type: 'service', location: 'New Brunswick, NJ', desc: 'Putting our values into action. A community service event grounded in the principle of seva — selfless service.', }, { date: 'TBD', year: '2025', title: 'End of Semester Satsang', type: 'satsang', location: 'Rutgers University–New Brunswick', desc: 'A closing circle to reflect on the semester — sharing stories, intentions, and gratitude as a community.', }, ]; export default function Events() { return (

events

Satsang discussions, workshops, speaker events, and service initiatives. Open to all women at Rutgers, regardless of background or belief.

{EVENTS.map((ev) => (
{ev.date} {ev.year}
{ev.type}

{ev.title}

{ev.location}

{ev.desc}

))}
); }
